patches.hypothesis: Based on the analysis, the refined fix will address the hardcoded values, generalize the logic, and improve edge case handling while avoiding overfitting. The fix will also ensure proper null checks and boundary conditions.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug was caused by the fact that the method was not handling the case where the input string contains supplementary characters. The method was not able to correctly identify the numerical entity in this case, leading to incorrect output.

patches.hypothesis: The bug is caused by an incorrect index calculation when the input string contains supplementary characters. The fix involves using the correct index calculation method and handling the supplementary characters correctly.

- use the incorrect index calculation method
+ handle supplementary characters correctly
